backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend that handles booking submissions, session registrations, and user profiles with admin-gated query/delete operations and role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two admin panel fixes — correct authenticated identity passing to the backend actor and proper useQueries hook behavior for authenticated fetching — to their respective source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering components, hooks, styles, and configuration used in the Jigar Chaudhary trainer website.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for both light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart, and destructive color roles.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app with UTF-8 charset, viewport meta, a custom page title, and Google Fonts preconnect/import for Bebas Neue and Inter typefaces.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component implementing hash-based client-side routing that renders AdminPanel for /#/admin, RegisterPage for /#/register, or the full main-site layout with all section components.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying Jigar's bio, a classroom photo with an orange gradient border frame, achievement counters, and scroll-triggered FadeIn animations using the useInView hook.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel component with a two-step auth flow (Internet Identity login then password gate) that fetches, displays, and allows deletion of bookings and session registrations using authenticated backend queries.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: A contact/booking section with a form (name, email, phone, event type, message) that submits via a React Query mutation, plus social links and WhatsApp button.
frontend/src/components/Corporate.tsx: A section showcasing Jigar's corporate workshop offerings, listing five workshop topics with icons and a button to scroll to the contact form.
frontend/src/components/CounterAnimation: A reusable animated counter component that counts up to a target number with an ease-out cubic animation when the element enters the viewport.
frontend/src/components/CTABanner.tsx: A full-width call-to-action section with animated entry that prompts visitors to book Jigar via a contact form scroll or WhatsApp link.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the brand name, quick navigation links, and social media icons (Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube) with smooth-scroll support.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: The hero section featuring a headline, animated stat counters, CTA buttons, and a background with gradient glows; content is split into text-left and image-right on large screens.
frontend/src/components/Lightbox.tsx: A modal lightbox component that displays a full-screen image overlay, closeable via click-outside, Escape key, or a close button, with body scroll locking.
frontend/src/components/MediaCertificati: Renders a photo gallery grid of 24 workshop images with lazy-loaded, scroll-animated items, hover overlays, and a Lightbox component for full-image viewing.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware background, smooth-scroll anchor links, a mobile hamburger menu, and a 'Live Session' / 'Book Now' CTA.
frontend/src/components/Programs.tsx: Displays a grid of five program cards (REVIVE, Master Your Circle, etc.) with icons, descriptions, and a 'Register Now' button that scrolls to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/RegisterPage.tsx: Full-page registration form for a live session with a countdown timer, form submission via a React Query mutation, a success state, and a WhatsApp community CTA.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Renders a 2-column grid of four testimonial cards with star ratings, quote icons, and scroll-triggered fade-in animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using an authenticated identity when available and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountdown.ts: Custom hook that calculates and updates a days/hours/minutes/seconds countdown to a target date every second, returning an isLive flag when the target is reached.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity state, login/clear functions, and status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useInView.ts: Custom hook wrapping IntersectionObserver that returns a ref and a boolean indicating whether the referenced element is in the viewport, with configurable threshold, rootMargin, and once options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating bookings and registrations via the backend actor, gating queries on authenticated identity and actor readiness.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, and defines CSS custom properties for brand and register-page design tokens along with utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL/hash query parameters and persisting them to sessionStorage, including helpers to clear sensitive params from the address bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with brand colors, fonts, border radii, shadows, animations, and registering animate, typography, and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features and known issues, specifically focused on fixing the admin panel's 'account may not have admin permissions' error caused by the authenticated identity not being passed correctly to the backend actor.
